title: AFI ProvenanceRecord v1 (District 2 M1 DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION canonical provenance record for one signal's pipeline pass: input hash, enrichment hash, output hash, evidence and source-disclosure references, replay pins, domain tags, and stage schema versions. Generalizes the POC AuditRecord concept WITHOUT demoOnly fields. SCOPE BOUNDARY: this record carries NO L1 anchoring, NO settlement claims, NO rewards, NO vault mechanics, and NO validator-decision fields — such fields are structurally rejected (additionalProperties:false).
$comment: Timestamp policy (District 2 hash doctrine): this record intentionally carries no runtime/storage timestamps (createdAt, storedAt, ...). Time lives in the normalized evidence/domain timestamps of the referenced EvidenceRef objects. Storage concerns (e.g. MongoDB) are an implementation profile referenced via storageProfileRef, not protocol canon.
x-afiPartOf: AFI District 2 — Canonical Data & Provenance Boundary (D2 M1)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: District 2 D-17 decision — authorizes D2 M1 only (afi-config schema drafts and tests)
District 2 hash doctrine — volatile processing timestamps are not canonical hash material; normalized evidence/domain timestamps are

x-afiOpenItems.PR-O1: Whether enrichmentHash binds a per-lane hash list vs a single bundle hash — this draft models a single optional enrichment/bundle hash; per-lane hashes live in EnrichmentProvenance.laneOutputHash.
x-afiOpenItems.PR-O2: schemaVersions stage-key registry — OPEN; free-form stage → schema-id map in this draft.

schema.description: Schema version identifier for ProvenanceRecord v1.

signalId.description: Stable unique identifier of the signal this record covers (same id space as USS provenance.signalId).

canonicalizationVersion.description: Canonical serialization rules version used for every hash in this record (e.g. 'afi.hash.v1'). Must agree with the canonicalizationVersion inside each CanonicalHash.

inputHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the canonical input (e.g. the normalized inbound signal) — signal-input domain.

enrichmentHash.description: OPTIONAL CanonicalHash v1 of the enrichment bundle (aggregate over lane outputs) — enrichment-bundle domain.

outputHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the canonical output (e.g. the ScoredSignal v1 projection) — scored-output domain.

evidenceRefs.description: EvidenceRef v1 objects backing this pipeline pass.

sourceDisclosureRefs.description: References (sourceId values) to SourceDisclosureProfile v1 objects for the sources involved.

replayProfileRef.description: OPTIONAL reference to the ReplayProfile v1 pinning replay inputs for this pass.

domainTags.description: OPTIONAL summary of the off-chain hash domains touched by this record (mirrors the domainTag values of the contained hashes).

schemaVersions.description: OPTIONAL map of pipeline stage → schema version id used at that stage (e.g. {"input": "afi.usignal.v1.1", "envelope": "afi.analyst-input-envelope.v1", "output": "afi.scored-signal.v1"}).

storageProfileRef.description: OPTIONAL reference to the storage implementation profile (e.g. a MongoDB persistence profile) under which the record is stored. Storage remains an implementation profile, NOT protocol canon; no storage fields appear inline.
